basics.name: Hao Yuan
basics.summary: M.E. candidate in Cyberspace Security at Xidian University, advised by Prof. Hui Zhu. Research interests include applied cryptography, privacy-preserving computation, homomorphic encryption, trusted execution environment, and searchable encryption.

work.summary: Led the adaptation of the Kunpeng KAE encryption engine to the domestic open-source cryptographic library OpenHiTLS (Cybersecurity Association of China Innovation Funding Program, 60,000 RMB). Successfully merged code into the OpenHiTLS community repository. Awarded Second Prize for Outstanding Students by the Cybersecurity Association of China.
Developed OpenSSL provider code for the hardware acceleration engine of ShangMi (SM) cryptographic algorithms. Code successfully merged into the department's internal Gitee repository.
